reference: BECAUSE THERE HAVE BEEN BAD PRIESTS BECAUSE SAGITTAIRE BISHOP OF GAP WAS THE BROTHER OF SALONE BISHOP OF EMBRUN AND BECAUSE BOTH OF THEM FOLLOWED MOMMOL
text: Because there have been bad priests, because Sagittara, Bishop of Gap, was the brother of Salone, Bishop of Ambrosia, and because both of them followed Mamol.
